metadata.description: Responsive cloud distribution config for Belgium campaign

cloud_distribution.explanation: Clouds occupy 5% to 60% of sky height. Upper 40% of sky is reserved for plane visibility.

cloud_tiers.name: far_clouds
cloud_tiers.description: Far clouds: move very slowly, appear in upper 15% of sky

cloud_tiers.name: mid_clouds
cloud_tiers.description: Mid clouds: moderate speed, appear in 20-40% of sky

cloud_tiers.name: near_clouds
cloud_tiers.description: Near clouds: fast speed, appear in 40-60% of sky

rendering_notes.canvas_scaling: All X/Y percentages are relative to canvas dimensions. Engine scales X by canvas width, Y by sky height (H - 90).
rendering_notes.parallax: Each cloud's horizontal position updates by: offset = parallax.cloudN * tier.speed_multiplier
rendering_notes.responsive: Cloud sizes scale with sky height: displayRadius = baseRadius * (skyHeight / 550)
rendering_notes.tiling: Clouds wrap horizontally when they move off-screen, reappearing on opposite side.
rendering_notes.opacity_blending: Each tier has opacity for atmospheric depth. Tier 0 (far) is most transparent.
